name: purrmadeath
description: 2D roguelike factory infinite game with cats

scripts.start:clean: npm run clean:parcel && parcel index.html --host localhost --port 3001 --open
scripts.clean:parcel: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path '.parcel-cache') { Remove-Item '.parcel-cache' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path 'dist') { Remove-Item 'dist' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.build:clean: npm run clean:parcel && npm run build
scripts.test: node --test tests/server/netSecurity.test.js tests/server/actionUtils.test.js tests/server/combatAuthority.test.js tests/server/buildingManager.test.js tests/modularizationGate.test.js
